author: maxine--basel
content:
Workaround: manually reset hub cache to origin and add .hub-write-lock to .gitignore on the hub branch:
  cd .crosslink/.hub-cache
  git reset --hard origin/crosslink/hub
  echo .hub-write-lock >> .gitignore
  git rm --cached .hub-write-lock
  git add .gitignore
  git commit -m 'fix: exclude .hub-write-lock from tracking'
  git push origin crosslink/hub

Proper fix should also update init_cache() or upgrade_to_v2() to ensure .hub-write-lock is gitignored when creating new hub branches.
